  • Additional Notes: The “Performance mode” game setting enables gameplay at 1080p/60fps.1080p/30fps gameplay is possible with the AMD Ryzen 3 3100, 3.40 GHZ or the Intel Core i3-8100, 3.60 GHz CPUs and the AMD Radeon RX 590, Intel Arc A580 or Nvidia GeForce GTX 980 GPUs.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:

  • OS: Windows 10 / Windows 11
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen 7 5800X / Intel Core i7-12700KF
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT / Nvidia GeForce RTX 2080 Ti
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 75 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: *SSD is required. The "Balanced mode" game setting enables gameplay at 1080p/60fps. Windows 10 (Version 1809 or later) and a GPU (graphics board/video card) with at least 4GB of VRAM are required to enable the DirectX 12 API. To play at 1080p/60fps in the “Quality mode” game setting, the AMD Ryzen 7 7700X or the Intel Core i7-12700KF CPUs and the AMD Radeon RX 7800 XT or Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070 Ti GPUs are recommended.
